name: private-website
description: Monorepo dev orchestration (book-mall, tool-web, finance-web, story-web)

scripts.dev:all: node -e "console.log('\n  >>> 开发导航: http://localhost:3000/dev\n')" && concurrently -k -n mall,tool,finance,story -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "pnpm --dir book-mall dev" "pnpm --dir tool-web dev" "pnpm --dir finance-web dev" "pnpm --dir story-web dev"
scripts.dev:all:story: node -e "console.log('\n  >>> 开发导航: http://localhost:3000/dev\n')" && concurrently -k -n mall,tool,finance,story,poll -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "pnpm --dir book-mall dev" "pnpm --dir tool-web dev" "pnpm --dir finance-web dev" "pnpm --dir story-web dev" "pnpm --dir book-mall story:poll-loop"
